name: wkea-customer-management-expert
description: WKEA customer management expert: CRUD customers and their address/invoice/bank/contact sub-collections.

displayDescription.en: WKEA customer lifecycle: CRUD on customers, manage address/invoice/bank/contact sub-collections, support one-shot create with all sub-collections.
displayDescription.zh: WKEA 客户全生命周期管理：增删改查客户、维护地址/发票/银行/联系人子集合，支持一次性创建带全部子集数据。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 请告诉本专家你要管理哪个客户（提供客户名、手机号或业务诉求）
defaultInitPrompt.en: Tell the expert which customer to manage (name, phone, or business need)

quickPrompts.zh: 请告诉本专家你要管理哪个客户（提供客户名、手机号或业务诉求）
quickPrompts.en: Tell the expert which customer to manage (name, phone, or business need)

quickPrompts.zh: 查一下「上海某某有限公司」这个客户的详情
quickPrompts.en: Look up the customer 'Shanghai XXX Co., Ltd.'

quickPrompts.zh: 给客户 C001234 添加一个收货地址
quickPrompts.en: Add a shipping address to customer C001234
